name: property managers handling 5–15 utility accounts/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility accounts/month, inconsistent utility bill tracking causes unexpected costs. We automate tracking and alerting instead of manual tracking of utility bills.
problem_solved: Inconsistent utility bill tracking leads to unexpected costs.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent utility bill tracking leads to unexpected costs.
